name: Gold Rush
description: Ek solved bug ka profit double ho jata hai. High value bugs par use karna zyada beneficial hota hai.

name: Insider Deal
description: Auction ke time bug ki purchase price 40% kam ho jati hai. Isse team ka overall profit margin increase hota hai.

name: Hostile Takeover
description: Team dusri team se ek unsolved bug steal kar sakti hai. Ye card solving phase ke start mein use hota hai.

name: Debug Vision
description: Team admin se ek hint le sakti hai. Difficult bugs solve karne mein helpful hota hai.

name: System Freeze
description: Team kisi dusri team ko 3 minutes ke liye freeze kar sakti hai. Freeze duration mein wo team answers submit nahi kar sakti.

name: Firewall
description: Team ko protection milta hai bug stealing aur freeze attacks se. Protection duration 10 minutes hoti hai.
